# pptx-win Visual QA Fixtures

These fixtures are text fixtures for non-COM validation and agent rehearsal. They do not require PowerPoint to open.

- `no-template-brief.json`: a compact deck brief for exercising no-template planning, layout selection, and QA rubric language.
- `visual-qa-expected.md`: expected review notes for the fixture brief.

Actual `.pptx` render fixtures belong in a COM-capable Office smoke workflow because screenshot export depends on Microsoft PowerPoint desktop.
